title: Stillwell sleep-education course: clean up six raw lesson narration takes into broadcast-clean voiceover masters + transcript/chapter pack
one_line_ask: Denoise and de-hiss six raw sleep-lesson narration takes into clean voiceover masters, then inspect them to produce a transcript/chapter pack, and hand everything back as one organized, zipped course-audio package.
